talents.name: Improved Heroic Strike
talents.description: Reduces the cost of your Heroic Strike ability by 1 rage point.

talents.name: Deflection
talents.description: Increases your Parry chance by 1%.

talents.name: Improved Rend
talents.description: Increases the bleed damage done by your Rend ability by 25%.

talents.name: Improved Charge
talents.description: Increases the amount of rage generated by your Charge ability by 3.

talents.name: Iron Will
talents.description: Increases your chance to resist Stun and Charm effects by an additional 3%.

talents.name: Improved Thunder Clap
talents.description: Reduces the cost of your Thunder Clap ability by 1 rage point and increases the damage by 40% and the slowing effect by an additional 4%.

talents.name: Improved Overpower
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Overpower ability by 25%.

talents.name: Anger Management
talents.description: Generates 1 rage per 3 seconds while in combat.

talents.name: Deep Wounds
talents.description: Your critical strikes cause the opponent to bleed, dealing 20% of your melee weapon's average damage over 12 sec.

talents.name: Two-Handed Weapon Specialization
talents.description: Increases the damage you deal with two-handed melee weapons by 1%.

talents.name: Impale
talents.description: Increases the critical strike damage bonus of your abilities in Battle, Defensive, and Berserker stance by 10%.

talents.name: Poleaxe Specialization
talents.description: Increases your chance to get a critical strike with Axes and Polearms by 1%.

talents.name: Death Wish
talents.description: When activated, increases your physical damage by 20% and makes you immune to Fear effects, but increases all damage taken by 5%. Lasts 30 sec.

talents.name: Mace Specialization
talents.description: Gives your melee attacks a chance to stun your target for 3 sec and generate 7 rage when using a Mace.

talents.name: Sword Specialization
talents.description: Gives you a 1% chance to get an extra attack on the same target after hitting your target with your Sword. (Proc chance: 1%, 500ms cooldown)

talents.name: Improved Intercept
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Intercept ability by 5 sec.

talents.name: Improved Hamstring
talents.description: Gives your Hamstring ability a 5% chance to immobilize the target for 5 sec. (Proc chance: 5%)

talents.name: Improved Disciplines
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Retaliation, Recklessness and Shield Wall abilities by 4 min and increases their duration by 2 sec.

talents.name: Blood Frenzy
talents.description: Your Rend and Deep Wounds abilities also increase all physical damage caused to that target by 2%.

talents.name: Mortal Strike
talents.description: A vicious strike that deals weapon damage plus 85 and wounds the target, reducing the effectiveness of any healing by 50% for 10 sec.

talents.name: Second Wind
talents.description: Whenever you are struck by a Stun or Immobilize effect you will generate 10 rage and 5% of your total health over 10 sec.

talents.name: Improved Mortal Strike
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Mortal Strike ability by 0.2 sec and increases the damage it causes by 1%.

talents.name: Endless Rage
talents.description: You generate 25% more rage from damage dealt.

talents.name: Booming Voice
talents.description: Increases the area of effect and duration of your Battle Shout, Demoralizing Shout and Commanding Shout by 10%.

talents.name: Cruelty
talents.description: Increases your chance to get a critical strike with melee weapons by 1%.

talents.name: Improved Demoralizing Shout
talents.description: Increases the melee attack power reduction of your Demoralizing Shout by 8%.

talents.name: Unbridled Wrath
talents.description: Gives you a chance to generate an additional rage point when you deal melee damage with a weapon.

talents.name: Improved Cleave
talents.description: Increases the bonus damage done by your Cleave ability by 40%.

talents.name: Piercing Howl
talents.description: Causes all enemies within 10 yards to be Dazed, reducing movement speed by 50% for 6 sec.

talents.name: Blood Craze
talents.description: Regenerates 1% of your total Health over 6 sec after being the victim of a critical strike.

talents.name: Commanding Presence
talents.description: Increases the melee attack power bonus of your Battle Shout and the health bonus of your Commanding Shout by 5%.

talents.name: Dual Wield Specialization
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your offhand weapon by 5%.

talents.name: Improved Execute
talents.description: Reduces the rage cost of your Execute ability by 2.

talents.name: Enrage
talents.description: Gives you a 5% melee damage bonus for 12 sec up to a maximum of 12 swings after being the victim of a critical strike.

talents.name: Improved Slam
talents.description: Decreases the casting time of your Slam ability by 0.5 sec.

talents.name: Sweeping Strikes
talents.description: Your next 10 melee attacks strike an additional nearby opponent.

talents.name: Weapon Mastery
talents.description: Reduces the chance for your attacks to be dodged by 1% and reduces the duration of all Disarm effects used against you by 25%. This does not stack with other Disarm duration reducing effects.

talents.name: Improved Berserker Rage
talents.description: The Berserker Rage ability will generate 5 rage when used.

talents.name: Flurry
talents.description: Increases your attack speed by 5% for your next 3 swings after dealing a melee critical strike.

talents.name: Precision
talents.description: Increases your chance to hit with melee weapons by 1%.

talents.name: Bloodthirst
talents.description: Instantly attack the target causing (Attack Power * 45 / 100) damage. In addition, the next 5 successful melee attacks will restore 10 health. This effect lasts 8 sec. Damage is based on your attack power.

talents.name: Improved Whirlwind
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Whirlwind ability by 1 sec.

talents.name: Improved Berserker Stance
talents.description: Increases attack power by 2% and reduces threat caused by 2% while in Berserker Stance.

talents.name: Rampage
talents.description: Warrior goes on a rampage, increasing attack power by 30 and causing most successful melee attacks to increase attack power by an additional 30. This effect will stack up to 5 times. Lasts 30 sec. This ability can only be used after scoring a critical hit.

talents.name: Improved Bloodrage
talents.description: Increases the instant rage generated by your Bloodrage ability by 3.

talents.name: Tactical Mastery
talents.description: You retain up to an additional 5 of your rage points when you change stances. Also greatly increases the threat generated by your Bloodthirst and Mortal Strike abilities when you are in Defensive Stance.

talents.name: Anticipation
talents.description: Increases your Defense skill by 4.

talents.name: Shield Specialization
talents.description: Increases your chance to block attacks with a shield by 1% and has a 20% chance to generate 1 rage when a block occurs. (Proc chance: 20%)

talents.name: Toughness
talents.description: Increases your armor value from items by 2%.

talents.name: Last Stand
talents.description: When activated, this ability temporarily grants you 30% of your maximum health for 20 sec. After the effect expires, the health is lost.

talents.name: Improved Shield Block
talents.description: Allows your Shield Block ability to block an additional attack and increases the duration by 1 second.

talents.name: Improved Revenge
talents.description: Gives your Revenge ability a 15% chance to stun the target for 3 sec. (Proc chance: 15%)

talents.name: Defiance
talents.description: Increases the threat generated by your attacks by 5% while in Defensive Stance and increases your expertise by 2.

talents.name: Improved Sunder Armor
talents.description: Reduces the cost of your Sunder Armor and Devastate abilities by 1 rage point.

talents.name: Improved Disarm
talents.description: Increases the duration of your Disarm ability by 1 secs.

talents.name: Improved Taunt
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Taunt ability by 1 sec.

talents.name: Improved Shield Wall
talents.description: Increases the effect duration of your Shield Wall ability by 3 secs.

talents.name: Concussion Blow
talents.description: Stuns the opponent for 5 sec.

talents.name: Improved Shield Bash
talents.description: Gives your Shield Bash ability a 50% chance to silence the target for 3 sec. (Proc chance: 50%)

talents.name: Shield Mastery
talents.description: Increases the amount of damage absorbed by your shield by 10%.

talents.name: One-Handed Weapon Specialization
talents.description: Increases physical damage you deal when a one-handed melee weapon is equipped by 2%.

talents.name: Improved Defensive Stance
talents.description: Reduces all spell damage taken while in Defensive Stance by 2%.

talents.name: Shield Slam
talents.description: Slam the target with your shield, causing 225 to 235 damage, modified by your shield block value, and dispels 1 magic effect on the target. Also causes a high amount of threat.

talents.name: Focused Rage
talents.description: Reduces the rage cost of your offensive abilities by 1.

talents.name: Vitality
talents.description: Increases your total Stamina by 1% and your total Strength by 2%.

talents.name: Devastate
talents.description: Sunder the target's armor causing the Sunder Armor effect. In addition, causes 50% of weapon damage plus 15 for each application of Sunder Armor on the target. The Sunder Armor effect can stack up to 5 times.
